## Sanitization Review

- [ ] This PR is public-safe and technically self-contained.
- [ ] No private issue numbers, private PR links, or private source locations are included.
- [ ] No private workflow logs, prompts, transcripts, diffs, or implementation notes are included.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credential values, private endpoint details, or private environment values are included.
- [ ] Public docs and PR body are understandable without private context.
